title: tephrosia reptans var. reptans
intro: Tephrosia reptans var. reptans, also known as the "Wild Bean" or "Creeping Tephrosia", is a type of flowering plant in the Fabaceae family, native to tropical Africa and parts of Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. It has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, and is also believed to have anti-cancer properties and to promote wound healing. Tephrosia reptans var. reptans can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also sometimes used as a traditional remedy in the form of a poultice or ointment.
